agendas.title: Anti-Intellectual Revolution
agendas.for: After a player researches a technology, they must destroy one of their non-fighter ships
agendas.against: At the start of each round, each player discards 1 action card

agendas.title: Archived Secret
agendas.for: Elected player draws 2 secret objectives
agendas.against: Elected player draws 3 action cards

agendas.title: Arms Reduction
agendas.for: Each player destroys all but 2 of their dreadnoughts and all but 4 of their cruisers
agendas.against: Each player returns 1 command token from their fleet pool to reinforcements

agendas.title: Classified Document Leaks
agendas.for: When a player scores a secret objective, they must reveal all secret objectives in hand
agendas.against: Each player that has scored a secret objective gains 1 trade good

agendas.title: Colonial Redistribution
agendas.for: Each player returns all planets outside their home system to the game board
agendas.against: Each player places 1 infantry from reinforcements on a planet they control

agendas.title: Committee Formation
agendas.for: The speaker cannot vote on agendas
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome draws 1 action card

agendas.title: Compensated Disarmament
agendas.for: Each player destroys all of their ground forces on Mecatol Rex; each player who destroys at least 1 ground force gains 3 trade goods
agendas.against: Each player places up to 2 infantry from reinforcements on Mecatol Rex

agendas.title: Conventions of War
agendas.for: Players cannot use BOMBARDMENT against planets that contain structures
agendas.against: Each player that voted for this outcome draws 1 action card

agendas.title: Core Mining
agendas.for: Attach this card to a hazardous planet; its resource value is increased by 2
agendas.against: Attach this card to a cultural planet; its influence value is increased by 2

agendas.title: Demilitarized Zone
agendas.for: All units in the Mecatol Rex system are returned to reinforcements; players cannot move units into the Mecatol Rex system
agendas.against: The Mecatol Rex system gains no effect

agendas.title: Economic Equality
agendas.for: Each player returns all trade goods to the supply and gains 5 trade goods
agendas.against: Each player returns all trade goods to the supply and draws 1 action card for every 3 trade goods returned (rounded down)

agendas.title: Enforced Travel Ban
agendas.for: Alpha and beta wormholes have no effect during movement
agendas.against: Players may not spend trade goods to increase the number of votes they cast

agendas.title: Executive Sanctions
agendas.for: Each player can have a maximum of 3 action cards in hand
agendas.against: Each player can have a maximum of 5 action cards in hand

agendas.title: Fleet Regulations
agendas.for: Each player places a maximum of 4 tokens in their fleet pool
agendas.against: Each player places a maximum of 5 tokens in their fleet pool

agendas.title: Galactic Crisis Pact
agendas.for: The speaker gains 1 victory point
agendas.against: The speaker loses 1 victory point

agendas.title: Holy Planet of Ixth
agendas.for: Attach this card to a cultural planet; its resource value and influence value are each increased by 2
agendas.against: Exhaust all cultural planets

agendas.title: Homeland Defense Act
agendas.for: Each player cannot have more than 2 PDS units on any planet
agendas.against: Each player places 1 PDS from reinforcements on a planet they control

agendas.title: Imperial Arbiter
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; at any time they may discard this card to swap 2 systems on the game board
agendas.against: Exhaust all planets in one system chosen by the speaker

agendas.title: Incentive Program
agendas.for: Draw 1 stage I public objective and place it faceup in the common play area
agendas.against: Draw 1 stage II public objective and place it faceup in the common play area

agendas.title: Ixthian Artifact
agendas.for: The speaker rolls 1 die; on 6-10 each player may research 1 technology; on 1-5 destroy all units on 3 planets you control
agendas.against: No effect

agendas.title: Judicial Abolishment
agendas.for: Discard all laws in play
agendas.against: Each player draws 1 action card for each law in play

agendas.title: Minister of Commerce
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; at the start of the strategy phase they gain 1 trade good for each neighbour they have
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome gains 1 trade good

agendas.title: Minister of Exploration
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; when they take control of a planet, they gain 1 trade good
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome gains 1 trade good

agendas.title: Minister of Industry
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; they may place 1 space dock from reinforcements on a planet they control
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome places 1 PDS from reinforcements on a planet they control

agendas.title: Minister of Peace
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; after a player activates a system that contains one of their units, that player loses 1 trade good
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome gains 1 trade good

agendas.title: Minister of Policy
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; at the end of the status phase they draw 1 action card
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome draws 1 action card

agendas.title: Minister of Sciences
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; when they research a technology, they may spend 3 trade goods to ignore 1 prerequisite
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome gains 2 trade goods

agendas.title: Minister of War
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; they may convert 1 of their command tokens from their strategy pool to their fleet pool at the start of each round
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome places 1 cruiser from reinforcements in their home system

agendas.title: Miscount Disclosed
agendas.for: Revote on the previous agenda
agendas.against: The previous agenda has no further effect

agendas.title: Mutiny
agendas.for: Each player who voted for this outcome gains 1 victory point
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome loses 1 victory point

agendas.title: New Constitution
agendas.for: Discard all laws in play. At the end of this agenda phase draw 2 agendas from the top of the deck and resolve each
agendas.against: No effect

agendas.title: Prophecy of Ixth
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card; they apply +1 to the result of each of their unit's combat rolls
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome applies +1 to their SPACE COMBAT rolls until end of round

agendas.title: Public Execution
agendas.for: Elected player discards all action cards from hand and loses 3 trade goods
agendas.against: Elected player gains 1 trade good for each action card in hand

agendas.title: Publicize Weapon Schematics
agendas.for: If any player has a war sun on the board, all players may research the War Sun tech (ignoring prerequisites); destroy all war suns
agendas.against: No effect

agendas.title: Regulated Conscription
agendas.for: No more than 2 ground forces may participate in combat on a given planet
agendas.against: No effect; each player that voted for this outcome places 2 infantry from reinforcements on a planet they control

agendas.title: Representative Government
agendas.for: Each player with a cultural planet gains 1 additional vote during agenda phase
agendas.against: Each player can cast a total of only 1 vote on each agenda

agendas.title: Research Team: Biotic
agendas.for: Attach this card to a planet with a green technology specialty; its resource value is increased by 1
agendas.against: Attach this card to a planet without a technology specialty; that planet gains a green technology specialty

agendas.title: Research Team: Cybernetic
agendas.for: Attach this card to a planet with a yellow technology specialty; its resource value is increased by 1
agendas.against: Attach this card to a planet without a technology specialty; that planet gains a yellow technology specialty

agendas.title: Research Team: Propulsion
agendas.for: Attach this card to a planet with a blue technology specialty; its resource value is increased by 1
agendas.against: Attach this card to a planet without a technology specialty; that planet gains a blue technology specialty

agendas.title: Research Team: Warfare
agendas.for: Attach this card to a planet with a red technology specialty; its resource value is increased by 1
agendas.against: Attach this card to a planet without a technology specialty; that planet gains a red technology specialty

agendas.title: Seed of an Empire
agendas.for: The player with the most victory points gains 1 victory point
agendas.against: The player with the fewest victory points gains 1 victory point

agendas.title: Senate Sanctuary
agendas.for: Mecatol Rex is immune to the BOMBARDMENT ability
agendas.against: No effect

agendas.title: Shard of the Throne
agendas.for: The speaker gains this card and 1 VP; if they ever lose this card they lose 1 VP
agendas.against: The speaker draws 1 secret objective

agendas.title: Shared Research
agendas.for: Each player's technology prerequisites are reduced by 1 for all technologies
agendas.against: No effect

agendas.title: Wormhole Reconstruction
agendas.for: All systems containing alpha or beta wormholes are adjacent to each other
agendas.against: Each player that has a ship in or adjacent to a wormhole system may move that ship to any other wormhole system

agendas.title: Wormhole Research
agendas.for: Players that have ships in systems containing wormholes gain 1 trade good at the start of the status phase
agendas.against: Each player who voted for this outcome gains 2 trade goods
